description: Used to organize content across different screens, data sets, and other interactions.

props.alignTabs: Aligns the tabs to the `start`, `center`, or `end` of container. Also accepts `title` to align with the `v-toolbar-title` component.
props.color: Applies specified color to the selected tab - supports utility colors (for example `success` or `purple`) or css color (`#033` or `rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5)`). Find a list of built-in classes on the [colors page](/styles/colors#material-colors).
props.centerActive: Forces the selected tab to be centered.
props.direction: Changes the direction of the tabs. Can be either `horizontal` or `vertical`.
props.fixedTabs: Tabs will be centered and each tab item will grow up to 300px width.
props.grow: Forces tabs to take up all available space.
props.height: Sets the height of the tabs bar.
props.inset: Changes the slider to take full height. Tabs will also get some spacing and customizable rounding.
props.insetPadding: Sets custom spacing between tabs for `inset` mode.
props.insetRadius: Sets custom border radius for the tabs container `inset` mode. Rounding for individual tabs is calculated by subtracting the padding.
props.items: The items to display in the component. This can be an array of strings or objects with a property `text`.
props.mobileBreakpoint: Sets the designated mobile breakpoint for the component.
props.showArrows: Show pagination arrows if the tab items overflow their container. For mobile devices, arrows will only display when using this prop.
props.sliderColor: Changes the background color of an auto-generated `v-tabs-slider`.
props.sliderTransition: Changes slider transition to one of the predefined animation presets.
props.sliderTransitionDuration: Applies custom slider transition duration. Default duration depends on transition type (fade: 400, grow: 350, shift: 225).
props.stacked: Apply the stacked prop to all children v-tab components.

slots.[`item.${string}`]: Dynamic slot to define custom slots for specific tab window items
slots.[`tab.${string}`]: Dynamic slot to define custom slots for specific tab headers in the slide group
slots.tab: Slot for custom tab header content.
slots.window: Slot for custom tab window content.
